title: client_id hardcoded to 1; server-side ACL policy silently broken
description: client.rs line 253 hardcodes comm_cfg.client_id = 1 with no documentation and no way for callers to override. wolfHSM uses the client ID for server-side access-control on keys and NVM objects. Every client from this API presents as client 1, making multi-client deployments and server ACL policies silently ineffective. This is a fossilizing API surface: adding client_id to connect() is a breaking change after anyone ships against this crate.
